mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.disease_name: Krabbe disease, atypical, due to saposin A deficiency
mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: neonatal or early childhood onset of demyelinating disorder with psychomotor regression

neurological signs including seizures, metabolic acidosis, hypoglycemia
failure to thrive, pallor, constipation, progressive neurologic deterioration
